summary: Seven military equipment targets assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence; all exhibit catastrophic structural damage with no intact major components remaining, consistent with K-kill status. The scene depicts a battlefield littered with multiple destroyed armored vehicles, some still emitting smoke and fire, indicating recent or ongoing destruction. The functional impact is complete loss of combat capability for all assessed targets.
